documents.title: Periodic Transaction Report (278-T) — February 10, 2025
documents.summary: Signed February 10, 2025 by the outgoing Principal Deputy Director of National Intelligence. Discloses 42 transactions across January 2024 through January 2025 — entirely American Funds and iShares mutual-fund purchases (American Balanced, American Capital World, American Investment Co, American Strategic Bond, iShares Core Aggressive Allocation and similar) plus one iShares Core Aggressive Allocation sale. All amounts in the $1,001-$15,000 or $15,001-$50,000 ranges, all flagged No for late notification.

documents.title: Termination Report (OGE Form 278e)
documents.summary: Termination Report signed February 23, 2025; date of termination January 24, 2025 from the August 2021 PAS appointment. Lists U.S. Coast Guard Academy Board of Visitors as the only prior federal position. Sole reportable account is a brokerage retirement IRA holding eight American Funds Class F2 mutual funds (Capital World Growth & Income, EuroPacific Growth, Growth Fund of America, New Economy, New Perspective, Small Cap World, New World, Global Insight) plus cash, individual line items in the $1,001-$50,000 range.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: ProPublica's Trump Team Financial Disclosures index was reachable but its individual-appointee detail pages could not be parsed via WebFetch. Dixon was a Biden-era ODNI deputy who terminated January 24, 2025; she may not appear in ProPublica's Trump Team database. Cross-check deferred.
